title: Muqadama
subTitle: Ajit returns home to see that his wife has killed herself after being raped by three men. He tries to avenge her but is caught by the police and sentenced to be hanged after he kills one culprit.

title: Trimurti
subTitle: A wrongfully convicted policewoman expects her three children to settle scores with her enemy. But when the long-awaited moment arrives, luck does not seem to be on her side.

title: Chamku
subTitle: Chandrama is adopted by a Naxal leader and grows up to be a Naxalite. However, when his adoptive father is killed, he is forced to become a police assassin and later, falls in love with Shubhi.

title: Akele Hum Akele Tum
subTitle: Two aspiring singers, Rohit and Kiran, fall in love and get married. Soon, the burden of responsibilities cripples the marriage and Kiran decides to part ways with Rohit.

title: Shirdi Ke Sai Baba
subTitle: A doctor who does not believe in Sai Baba's powers travels to Shirdi with his ill son. Soon, the doctor has to decide between Sai Baba and science to treat his ailing son.

title: Henna
subTitle: Henna, a bubbly young woman based in a village in Pakistan, sets her heart on an endearing stranger who winds up there with serious injuries and no memory of his past.

title: Khudgarz
subTitle: Sita raises her son, Bihari, and his friend Amar as her own and the two treat each other like brothers. However, Amar's father is not too fond of Bihari, and he tries to create a rift between the two.

title: Naaka Bandi
subTitle: Veera raises Raja, his foster sibling, after their parents are killed by Mangal. While Veera seeks to avenge his parents' murder, Raja's estranged uncle Kaalia arrives to instigate Raja against him.

title: Krantiveer
subTitle: Pratap, a gambler disowned by his family, comes under the care of a landlord named Laxminath. When corrupt forces lead to Laxminath's murder, Pratap seeks revenge.

title: Aashiq
subTitle: Pooja and Chander fall in love and want to be together. However, since Pooja's alcoholic father would never approve, she decides to run away from her house but, unfortunately, lands in a brothel.

title: Aashiq
subTitle: Pooja and Chander fall in love and want to be together. However, since Pooja's alcoholic father would never approve, she decides to run away from her house but, unfortunately, lands in a brothel.

title: Drohi
subTitle: Krishna, a cop, is assigned the responsibility of tracking down a notorious hitman, Raghav. He finds himself in a dilemma when he discovers that his sister is in love with Raghav.

title: Moksha
subTitle: Vikram and Ritika plan to rob a bank to fund their business of providing free legal services to impoverished people. However, things get complicated when she is found dead.

title: Barsaat
subTitle: Badal, a simple village boy, falls for his classmate Tina. However, Tina's father does not approve of their relationship and conspires to separate them.

title: Sandwich
subTitle: Sher Singh has two wives, Nisha and Sweety, and juggles his time between them. However, when his two wives cross paths, his troubles increase manifold leading to hilarious situations.

title: Hero Hindustani
subTitle: A young woman conspires with a man to fake a relationship, outsmarting her grandfather's plans to marry her off to a stranger.

title: Bade Miyan Chote Miyan
subTitle: In a strange faraway town, small-time crooks Bade and Chote stir up double trouble and leave their policemen look-alikes flapping around like headless chickens.

title: Khiladiyon Ka Khiladi
subTitle: A man comes to America in order to find his brother who is wanted by the police. But his search forces him to get mixed up with a lady gangster that facilitates illegal underground fights.

title: Bol Radha Bol
subTitle: While Kishen enjoys village life and romance with Radha, a sinister doppelganger plots. Upon returning home, he'll discover his identity and life stolen by this malevolent impostor.

title: Aag Se Khelenge
subTitle: While trying to arrest a gangster, a police officer joins hands with Johnny, one of the gangster's men who claims to be an undercover police officer himself.

title: Aag Se Khelenge
subTitle: While trying to arrest a gangster, a police officer joins hands with Johnny, one of the gangster's men who claims to be an undercover police officer himself.

title: Maseeha
subTitle: Krishna, a victim of the local gangster Surajbhan's atrocities, joins forces with Shiva, whose parents were killed upon Surajbhan's orders, and resolves to bring him down.

title: Main Khiladi Tu Anari
subTitle: A Bombay police officer seeks revenge when a drug dealer kills his brother. However, things get complicated when a film star begins to tag along, so that he can research a film role.

title: Rehnaa Hai Terre Dil Mein
subTitle: Maddy has seven days to win Reena's affections before she finds out that he is not Rajeev, the childhood friend and prospective fiance she has been expecting.

title: No Entry
subTitle: A gorgeous club dancer's ill-timed rendezvous opens up a Pandora's box of lies, absurdities and misunderstandings in the lives of three quirky couples.

title: Sirf Tum
subTitle: Deepak and Aarti fall in love with each other without ever meeting each other. Later, Aarti sets out to look for him in the city of Delhi.

title: Naseeb Apna Apna
subTitle: A naive village girl marries the son of a domineering man. However, upon her arrival at his house in the city, she finds out that he is already married.

title: Ghayal
subTitle: Balwant Rai, a corrupt businessman, frames Ajay for the murder of his brother. Later, with no support from those close to him, Ajay takes an unlikely route to seek revenge.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Zafar's obsessive love for Salma leads to her separation from her son, Iqbal. Twenty years later, Iqbal strives to reunite with his mother.

title: Balidaan
subTitle: Police Inspector Vijay makes an enemy of bandit Ranga after he kills one of his men. After the vengeful Ranga wilfully abducts Vijay's wife and daughter, he must race against time to save his family.
